themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "And if she be not able to bring a lamb, then she shall bring two turtles, or two young pigeon...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְטָהֵֽרָה׃: for her and she shall be clean - to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterate...".

4: She shall then continue in the blood of her purification...
6: ‘When the days of her purification are fulfilled, whether for...
